HDFC Ergo.MRI_rules: MRI is NOT approved as a first step. Requires X-Ray and 2 weeks physical therapy first.
HDFC Ergo.drug_tier: Only generic drugs approved. Branded drugs (like Crocin, Augmentin) are rejected.
HDFC Ergo.diabetes_rules: Insulin pumps are only approved for Type 1 Diabetes. Type 2 Diabetes patients must use standard Metformin pills first.
HDFC Ergo.blood_tests: Standard blood tests (CBC, Lipid) are fully approved with no restrictions.
